title: Czech Quarterly Close Decision Tree
description: Machine-readable process tree for čtvrtletní uzávěrka. Use for AI agent routing of quarterly close tasks.

nodes.label: Quarter-end date reached
nodes.description: Q1: 31 Mar, Q2: 30 Jun, Q3: 30 Sep, Q4: 31 Dec

nodes.label: All invoices posted for full quarter?
Post missing invoices and document timing
Bank reconciliation complete?
Reconcile account 221 against bank statement
Entity is DPH plátce?
On quarterly DPH period? (turnover < 10M CZK, ≥ 12 months as plátce)
Monthly plátce: DAP/KH filed monthly — no quarterly DPH DAP
Any EU goods deliveries (IDD) this quarter?
File SH monthly for this quarter and remainder of calendar year
nodes.detail: File catch-up SH for all months in quarter before first IDD; continue monthly through 31 Dec

nodes.label: File SH quarterly simultaneous with DAP (services only)
Prepare and file DAP + KH
DPPO quarterly záloha due this quarter?
nodes.description: Due if prior-year DPPO > 150,000 CZK. Dates: Q1=15 Mar, Q2=15 Jun, Q3=15 Sep, Q4=15 Dec

nodes.label: Pay 25% of last known DPPO. Account: MD 341 / D 221
Is estimated 2026 DPPO >> advance schedule?
nodes.description: Estimate: YTD profit × 0.21 × 12/months. If significantly higher, consider záloha reduction request.

nodes.label: Consult tax advisor — § 38a odst. 7 záloha reduction request before next due date
Any prior-quarter errors discovered?
Determine error type

branches.action: File dodatečné DAP. Pay additional DPH + úrok z prodlení.
Reconcile at next advance date or in annual return

nodes.label: ČSÚ quarterly statistical forms due?
nodes.description: Check ISSV portal. Applies to entities selected by ČSÚ under Act 89/1995.

nodes.label: Submit ČSÚ forms via ISSV portal within 30 days of quarter end
Entity is OSVČ with quarterly DPFO advance due?
nodes.description: Due if prior-year DPFO from business > 150,000 CZK. Same dates as DPPO.

nodes.label: Pay 25% of last known DPFO from business
Prepare management reports: výsledovka + rozvaha. Review DPPO advance tracking.
Validate EU customer VAT numbers via VIES portal. Document results.
Quarterly close complete. Sign off and archive.
